content.thinking:
Now I have a thorough understanding of both the brand book AND the actual implementation patterns. Let me identify the key issues with the current settings page and what needs to change.

Key findings:

1. **The brand book colors vs globals.css colors are DIFFERENT**:
   - Brand book: `--bg-card: #1A1A1A`, `--bg-secondary: #0F0F0F`, `--bg-primary: #000000`
   - globals.css: `--color-bg-card: #2C2F38` (L1), `--color-bg-secondary: #1A1C22` (L-1), canvas: #22242B (L0)
   - The actual app uses the globals.css values with `--color-` prefix

2. **Workspace hero card uses `--color-bg-secondary` (recessed L-1) NOT `--color-bg-card` (L1)** — it's a recessed section within the canvas with a subtle border and inset shadow for depth.

3. **Settings page needs similar treatment** — I should apply the same recessed styling pattern to match the workspace hero card approach.

4. **The heading placement differs between them** — workspace puts the title inside the hero section, while settings currently floats it above the card, creating inconsistent visual hierarchy.

Now I'm considering whether to follow the workspace pattern fully by putting everything in a recessed section, or keep the split layout but update the card styling to match. Looking at the workspace structure more carefully, I see it uses a welcome hero section with the title, stats, and controls all contained in a single card with secondary background styling. For the settings page, I should follow that same pattern—a hero section card at the top containing the title and any introductory content, then the form below, rather than having the title sit outside the card like it currently does. So inputs should sit at bg-secondary for that recessed feel, creating visual hierarchy within the card. The workspace hero uses bg-secondary because it's not a card at all—it's just an informational section. For the settings form, since it's actually a card containing inputs, I should use bg-card as the container so the darker input fields create proper contrast. Let me look at what's actually wrong with the current settings implementation to see where the brand alignment breaks down.

Now I'm examining the current settings page structure—the outer wrapper, header, main content area, heading section with animations, and the form card styling...

Still writing form styles...

I'm noticing a critical issue: the `--space-8` variable that's being used for the card padding isn't actually defined in globals.css, which means the padding will fall back to nothing and the card could end up with no spacing at all. I need to check what spacing variables are actually available. The workspace hero uses Tailwind's `p-8` class instead of the broken CSS variable, so that's the fix for the padding issue. Beyond that, the Settings card is using the wrong background color—it needs `--color-bg-secondary` like the workspace hero, not the elevated `--color-bg-card`—and the border color is also mismatched, using `--color-border-default` when it should be `--color-border-subtle`.

The Settings card is also missing the inset shadow that gives the workspace hero its depth, and there's a structural difference where the heading sits outside the card instead of inside it. Plus there are conflicting duration classes in the animation that need to be cleaned up.

Looking at the workspace pattern as the reference...

The workspace hero works as a single unified container holding the title, stats, and action button all together. For settings, I could either follow that same approach with one cohesive section containing the title, description, form fields, and save button, or split it into a separate header section above the form. Since workspace keeps everything integrated, that unified approach probably makes more sense here too, even though the settings form is interactive while the workspace hero is just informational.

But there's a color contrast issue I'm running into. If I use bg-secondary for the main section container, and the form inputs also use bg-secondary, they'd blend together with no visual distinction. Looking at the color values, bg-secondary is #1A1C22 while input backgrounds are #0F0F0F in the brand book, so I need to make sure the form fields have darker backgrounds to stand out against the container.

The workspace pattern uses bg-secondary for the hero section, but that works because it doesn't contain form inputs. Since the settings page is fundamentally different—it's form-heavy—I should probably use bg-card (#2C2F38) for the container instead, which would give the inputs proper contrast against the lighter background. The page title can still sit on the canvas following the workspace approach, but the form itself needs its own card treatment.

Looking at the actual issues: the `--space-8` variable doesn't exist, so I need to switch to Tailwind's `p-8` class. The card needs that inset shadow from the workspace design for visual depth. There are also duplicate duration classes to clean up. Let me check the globals.css to see what variables are actually available and make sure I'm using the right ones.

file.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>K3RN.LABS - Brand Book</title>
  <style>
    * {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

    :root {
      /* Brand Colors - Exactes de l'inspiration */
      --brand-primary: #F75105;
      --brand-secondary: #F78E21;

      /* Neutral Scale - Exactes de l'inspiration */
      --neutral-darkest: #000000;
      --neutral-dark-900: #22242B;
      --neutral-dark-800: #2F323A;
      --neutral-dark-700: #5D5C5B;
      --neutral-light-300: #D2D3D4;
      --neutral-lightest: #FFFFFF;

      /* Backgrounds */
      --bg-primary: #000000;
      --bg-secondary: #0F0F0F;
      --bg-card: #1A1A1A;
      --bg-card-hover: #22242B;

      /* Borders */
      --border-subtle: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      --border-default: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      --border-strong: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);

      /* Text */
      --text-primary: #FAFAFA;
      --text-secondary: #A1A1AA;
      --text-muted: #71717A;

      /* Spacing */
      --space-1: 0.25rem;
      --space-2: 0.5rem;
      --space-3: 0.75rem;
      --space-4: 1rem;
      --space-6: 1.5rem;
      --space-8: 2rem;
      --space-12: 3rem;
      --space-16: 4rem;
      --space-20: 5rem;

      /* Radius */
      --radius-sm: 0.375rem;
      --radius-md: 0.5rem;
      --radius-lg: 0.75rem;
      --radius-xl: 1rem;
      --radius-2xl: 1.5rem;
      --radius-full: 9999px;

      /* Shadows */
      --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
      --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3);
      --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4);
      --shadow-glow: 0 0 30px rgba(247, 81, 5, 0.3);
    }

    body {
      font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
      background: var(--bg-primary);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      line-height: 1.5;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* Container */
    .container {
      max-width: 1400px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 0 var(--space-8);
    }

    /* Navigation */
    .nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      z-index: 1000;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
    }

    .nav-container {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-8);
    }

    .logo {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: var(--space-3);
      font-size: 1.125rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }

    .logo-icon {
      width: 36px;
      height: 36px;
    }

    .nav-links {
      display: flex;
      gap: var(--space-8);
      list-style: none;
    }

    .nav-link {
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      transition: color 0.2s;
      position: relative;
    }

    .nav-link:hover {
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }

    .nav-link.active {
      color: var(--brand-primary);
    }

    .nav-link.active::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -1.5rem;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
    }

    /* Hero */
    .hero {
      padding: 140px 0 100px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .hero-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: var(--space-2);
      padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-4);
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-full);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .hero-badge-dot {
      width: 6px;
      height: 6px;
      background: var(--brand-primary);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes pulse {

      0%,
      100% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
      }

      50% {
        opacity: 0.6;
        transform: scale(0.9);
      }
    }

    .hero-title {
      font-size: 5.5rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      line-height: 1;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .hero-title .brand-name {
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .hero-subtitle {
      font-size: 1.25rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      max-width: 700px;
      margin: 0 auto var(--space-12);
      line-height: 1.6;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    /* Section */
    .section {
      padding: var(--space-20) 0;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
    }

    .section-header {
      margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
    }

    .section-number {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--brand-primary);
      margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
    }

    .section-title {
      font-size: 3rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      line-height: 1.1;
      margin-bottom: var(--space-4);
    }

    .section-description {
      font-size: 1.125rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      max-width: 800px;
      line-height: 1.6;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    /* Grid */
    .grid {
      display: grid;
      gap: var(--space-6);
    }

    .grid-2 {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }

    .grid-3 {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    }

    .grid-4 {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    }

    /* Card */
    .card {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
      padding: var(--space-8);
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .card:hover {
      border-color: var(--border-strong);
      background: var(--bg-card-hover);
    }

    .card-title {
      font-size: 1.25rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      margin-bottom: var(--space-3);
    }

    .card-description {
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    /* Logo Showcase */
    .logo-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      gap: var(--space-8);
      margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }

    .logo-display {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
      padding: var(--space-16);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      min-height: 400px;
      position: relative;
    }

    .logo-display.light {
      background: var(--neutral-lightest);
    }

    .logo-label {
      position: absolute;
      top: var(--space-6);
      left: var(--space-6);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-muted);
    }

    .logo-display.light .logo-label {
      color: var(--neutral-dark-700);
    }

    .logo-svg {
      max-width: 400px;
      width: 100%;
      height: auto;
    }

    .logo-svg-small {
      max-width: 200px;
      width: 100%;
      height: auto;
    }

    /* Color Palette */
    .color-grid {
      display: grid;
      gap: var(--space-8);
      margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }

    .color-group {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .color-group-header {
      padding: var(--space-6);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }

    .color-group-title {
      font-size: 1.25rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
    }

    .color-swatches {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    }

    .color-swatch {
      padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-6);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      gap: var(--space-2);
      min-height: 180px;
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
    }

    .color-swatch:last-child {
      border-right: none;
    }

    .color-name {
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .color-value {
      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      opacity: 0.7;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    }

    /* Typography */
    .type-specimen {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
      padding: var(--space-12);
      margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .type-label {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
    }

    .type-display {
      font-size: 5rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      line-height: 1;
      margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
    }

    .type-alphabet {
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      margin-bottom: var(--space-6);
      line-height: 1.4;
    }

    .type-scale {
      display: grid;
      gap: var(--space-8);
      margin-top: var(--space-8);
    }

    .type-example {
      padding: var(--space-6);
      border-left: 3px solid var(--brand-primary);
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    }

    .type-meta {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
      margin-top: var(--space-2);
    }

    /* Components */
    .component-showcase {
      display: grid;
      gap: var(--space-8);
      margin-top: var(--space-12);
    }

    .component-demo {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
      border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .component-header {
      padding: var(--space-6);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default);
    }

    .component-title {
      font-size: 1.25rem;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .component-preview {
      padding: var(--space-12);
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      min-height: 250px;
    }

    /* Button */
    .btn {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: var(--space-2);
      padding: var(--space-3) var(--space-6);
      font-size: 0.875rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr" class="dark">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>K3RN.LABS — Workspace Final Design</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
           K3RN.LABS DESIGN TOKENS — Dark 900 Canvas System
           ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
           Depth architecture (cool blue undertone):
             L0  Canvas     #22242B  — page background
             L-1 Recessed   #1A1C22  — inputs, insets, radar
             L1  Card       #2C2F38  — elevated cards, dialogs
             L2  Card Hover #363940  — interactive surfaces
             L3  Surface    #464950  — buttons, controls, dock elements
             L4  Surface Hi #62656D  — muted interactive, scrollbar
           ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
        :root {
            /* ── Elevation layers ── */
            --bg-primary: #22242B;
            --bg-secondary: #1A1C22;
            --bg-card: #2C2F38;
            --bg-card-hover: #363940;
            --surface-1: #464950;
            --surface-2: #62656D;

            /* ── Borders (calibrated for #22242B base) ── */
            --border-subtle: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
            --border-default: rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
            --border-strong: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);

            /* ── Typography ── */
            --text-primary: #F5F5F7;
            --text-secondary: #A0A3AB;
            --text-muted: #6C6F78;

            /* ── Brand ── */
            --brand-primary: #F75105;
            --brand-secondary: #F78E21;

            /* ── Shadows (warmer glow on darker canvas) ── */
            --shadow-glow: 0 0 30px rgba(247,81,5,0.25);
            --shadow-soft: 0 0 15px rgba(247,81,5,0.12);
            --shadow-elevation: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);

            /* ── Radii ── */
            --radius-md: 8px;
            --radius-lg: 12px;
            --radius-xl: 16px;
            --radius-2xl: 24px;
            --radius-full: 9999px;

            /* ── Spacing ── */
            --space-1: 4px; --space-2: 8px; --space-3: 12px; --space-4: 16px;
            --space-6: 24px; --space-8: 32px; --space-12: 48px; --space-16: 64px;

            /* ── Decision palette ── */
            --color-go: #22C55E; --color-explore: #F59E0B; --color-park: #6B7280; --color-kill: #EF4444;
        }
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg-primary);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }
        /* Canvas dot-grid pattern */
        body::before {
            content: '';
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.035) 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 24px 24px;
        }
        ::selection { background: rgba(247,81,5,0.3); color: white; }

        /* ═══════ HEADER ═══════ */
        .header {
            position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            background: rgba(34,36,43,0.88);
            backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.2);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(1.2);
        }
        .header-inner {
            max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            height: 64px; padding: 0 var(--space-8);
        }
        .header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-6); }
        .logo {
            width: 32px; height: 32px; background: var(--brand-primary);
            border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; color: white;
            transition: transform 0.5s ease;
        }
        .logo:hover { transform: rotate(180deg); }
        .divider { width: 1px; height: 20px; background: var(--border-default); }
        .nav-links { display: flex; gap: var(--space-6); }
        .nav-link {
            font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--text-secondary); text-decoration: none;
            padding: 21px 0; position: relative; transition: color 0.2s;
        }
        .nav-link:hover { color: var(--text-primary); }
        .nav-link.active { color: var(--brand-primary); }
        .nav-link.active::after {
            content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
            height: 2px; background: var(--brand-primary);
        }
        .header-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-3); }
        .header-btn {
            padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted);
            background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md); cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .header-btn:hover { color: var(--text-primary); border-color: var(--border-strong); background: var(--bg-card); }
        .avatar {
            width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--surface-1); border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        /* ═══════ MAIN ═══════ */
        .main {
            max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto;
            padding: var(--space-12) var(--space-8) 160px;
            position: relative; z-index: 1;
        }

        /* ═══════ WELCOME HERO ═══════ */
        .welcome {
            margin-bottom: var(--space-12);
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
            padding: var(--space-8);
            box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
        }
        .welcome h1 {
            font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-primary);
            letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1;
            margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
        }
        .welcome h1 span { color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 300; }
        .welcome-sub {
            font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 400;
        }
        .welcome-sub strong { color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 500; }

        /* ═══════ GRID ═══════ */
        .projects-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: var(--space-6);
        }

        /* ═══════ PLATINUM CARD ═══════ */
        .p-card {
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.01) 100%),
                var(--bg-card);
            border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
            border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
            border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
            overflow: hidden;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
        }
        .p-card:hover {
            background:
                linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.08) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 100%),
                var(--bg-card-hover);
            border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }

        /* Color accent */
        .p-card .accent { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; }

        /* Card inner */
        .p-card-body { padding: var(--space-8); display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-height: 280px; }

        /* Card header row */
        .p-card-head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: var(--space-4); }
        .p-card-head .folder-icon {
            width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            background: var(--bg-primary); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
        }
        .p-card-head .folder-icon svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; color: var(--text-muted); }
        .p-card-score {
            text-align: right;
        }
        .p-card-score .val {
            font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-primary);
            font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; line-height: 1;
        }
        .p-card-score .val.dim { color: var(--text-muted); }
        .p-card-score .unit { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-left: 1px; }

        /* Card body text */
        .p-card-title {
            font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
            line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: var(--space-2);
            display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .p-card-desc {
            font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.5;
            display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* Card footer */
        .p-card-foot {
            margin-top: auto; padding-top: var(--space-4);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-subtle);
            display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
        }
        .p-card-date {
            font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
        }
        .p-card-date svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; }
        .p-card-foot-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-2); }
        .p-card-arrow {
            opacity: 0; transition: all 0.3s;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }
        .p-card:hover .p-card-arrow { opacity: 1; }
        .p-card-arrow svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

        /* Badge */
        .badge {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center;
            padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: var(--radius-full);
            font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em; border: 1px solid;
        }
        .badge-go { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); color: #4ade80; border-color: rgba(34,197,94,0.2); }
        .badge-explore { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1); color: #fbbf24; border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.2); }
        .badge-park { background: rgba(107,114,128,0.1); color: #9ca3af; border-color: rgba(107,114,128,0.2); }
        .badge-kill { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color: #f87171; border-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.2); }

        /* ═══════ NEW PROJECT CARD ═══════ */
        .new-card {
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px dashed var(--border-default);
            border-radius: var(--radius-2xl);
            min-height: 280px;
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            gap: var(--space-4);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .new-card:hover {
            border-color: var(--border-strong);
            background: var(--bg-card-hover);
        }
        .new-card .plus-circle {
            width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--bg-primary); border: 1px solid var(--border-default);
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
        .new-card:hover .plus-circle {
            border-color: var(--border-strong); background: var(--bg-card-hover);
        }
        .new-card .plus-circle svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: var(--text-muted); transition: color 0.2s; }
        .new-card:hover .plus-circle svg { color: var(--text-primary); }
        .new-card .new-label {
            font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }
        .new-card:hover .new-label { color: var(--text-secondary); }

        /* ═══════ PROJECT DETAIL OVERLAY ═══════ */
        .overlay-bg {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 100;
            background: rgba(15,16,20,0.70);
            backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(0.8);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(0.8);
            display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            padding: var(--space-8);
        }
        .overlay-bg.visible { display: flex; }
        .overlay-card {
            background: var(--bg-card);

Now I have a complete picture. Let me identify the critical issues with the current settings page:

**Bug critique:** `padding: "var(--space-8)"` — cette variable CSS **n'existe pas** dans `globals.css`. Le card n'a aucun padding. C'est le problème majeur.

**Problèmes structurels:**
1. Le titre est séparé du contenu (workspace met le titre DANS la section hero)
2. Le card utilise `bg-card` (L1 élevé) alors que le hero workspace utilise `bg-secondary` (L-1 recessé) — deux patterns différents pour des contextes différents
3. `duration-500 transition-all duration-300` — deux durations conflictuelles
4. `text-white` au lieu du token `--color-text-primary`

**Pattern workspace maquette:**
- Hero recessé (`bg-secondary`, `border-subtle`, inset shadow) → titre + sous-titre
- Cards élevées (`bg-card`, `border-default`) → contenu interactif

Je vais reproduire cette même architecture pour settings : un header recessé + un card formulaire élevé.

content.text:
Voici ce qui a changé et pourquoi :

**Bug critique corrigé :** L'ancienne version utilisait `padding: "var(--space-8)"` en inline style, mais `--space-8` **n'existe pas** dans `globals.css`. Le card n'avait aucun padding. Remplacé par la classe Tailwind `p-8` (32px) qui fonctionne.

**Structure alignée sur le workspace :**
- **Header recessé** (lignes 72-86) — exactement le même pattern que le welcome hero du workspace : `bg-secondary` (L-1), `border-subtle`, inset shadow, `radius-2xl`, `p-8`. Le titre vit à l'intérieur d'une surface, pas en flottant sur le canvas.
- **Form card élevé** (lignes 89-188) — suit la spec `.card` du brand book : `bg-card` (L1), `border-default`, `radius-2xl`, `p-8`. Les inputs en `bg-secondary` (L-1) créent le contraste correct contre le fond card.

**Corrections techniques :**
- `text-white` remplacé par `text-[--color-text-primary]` (utilise le token design system)
- `duration-500 transition-all duration-300` (durations conflictuelles) supprimé — une seule `duration-500` sur l'animation d'entrée
- La hierarchie d'élévation respecte l'architecture de profondeur : Canvas (L0) → Header recessé (L-1) → Card formulaire (L1) → Inputs recessés (L-1)

I'm wondering if 3rem is too large for a settings page title since the workspace typically uses 2.5rem, though the brand book specifically calls for 3rem at weight 300 for section titles. For an app settings page, the section-title level would work best as the main heading, with the section-description serving as a subtitle. So I'm going with 3rem weight 300 for the title and 1.125rem weight 300 for the subtitle, pulling from those brand book specs.

For form field labels, I'll use mb-3 (12px) as the margin below to create a comfortable gap between the label and input field. For spacing between form fields themselves, mb-6 (24px) feels appropriate based on the brand book's card grid spacing patterns.

Since the SiteHeader already handles top navigation, I should keep the page structure simple and just follow the brand book component specs directly: the page wrapper with SiteHeader, title area using the section-title and section-description styles, a card for the form, inputs and buttons matching the brand book specs exactly, and labels following the uppercase, muted text pattern. <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>K3RN.LABS - Brand Book</title>
  <style>
    * {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

    :root {
      /* Brand Colors - Exactes de l'inspiration */
      --brand-primary: #F75105;
      --brand-secondary: #F78E21;

      /* Neutral Scale - Exactes de l'inspiration */
      --neutral-darkest: #000000;
      --neutral-dark-900: #22242B;
      --neutral-dark-800: #2F323A;
      --neutral-dark-700: #5D5C5B;
      --neutral-light-300: #D2D3D4;
      --neutral-lightest: #FFFFFF;

      /* Backgrounds */
      --bg-primary: #000000;
      --bg-secondary: #0F0F0F;
      --bg-card: #1A1A1A;
      --bg-card-hover: #22242B;

      /* Borders */
      --border-subtle: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      --border-default: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      --border-strong: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);

      /* Text */
      --text-primary: #FAFAFA;
      --text-secondary: #A1A1AA;
      --text-muted: #71717A;

      /* Spacing */
      --space-1: 0.25rem;
      --space-2: 0.5rem;
      --space-3: 0.75rem;
      --space-4: 1rem;
      --space-6: 1.5rem;
      --space-8: 2rem;
      --space-12: 3rem;
      --space-16: 4rem;
      --space-20: 5rem;

      /* Radius */
      --radius-sm: 0.375rem;
      --radius-md: 0.5rem;
      --radius-lg: 0.75rem;
      --radius-xl: 1rem;
      --radius-2xl: 1.5rem;
      --radius-full: 9999px;

      /* Shadows */
      --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
      --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3);
      --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4);
      --shadow-glow: 0 0 30px rgba(247, 81, 5, 0.3);
    }

Maintenant j'ai toutes les specs exactes du brand book. Voici ce que le brand book définit, que je vais suivre à la lettre :

**Section :** `.section-title` = 3rem, weight 300, line-height 1.1 / `.section-description` = 1.125rem, weight 300, text-secondary, line-height 1.6

**Card :** `.card` = bg-card, border 1px border-default, radius-2xl, padding space-8, transition 0.3s

**Input :** `.input` = padding space-3 space-4, bg-secondary, border border-default, radius-md, text-primary, 0.875rem, transition 0.2s / focus: border brand-primary + box-shadow 3px glow

**Button primary :** `.btn-primary` = bg brand-primary, color white / hover: bg brand-secondary, shadow-glow, translateY(-1px)

**Button secondary :** `.btn-secondary` = bg transparent, text-primary, border border-default / hover: bg bg-card, border-strong

**Label :** `.caption` = 0.75rem, line-height 1.4, tracking 0.02em

content.text:
Page refaite. Chaque valeur est tirée directement du brand book :

| Composant | Spec brand book | Implémentation |
|---|---|---|
| **Section title** | `.section-title` : 3rem, weight 300, line-height 1.1, mb space-4 | `text-[3rem] font-light leading-[1.1] mb-4` |
| **Section description** | `.section-description` : 1.125rem, weight 300, text-secondary, line-height 1.6 | `text-[1.125rem] font-light leading-[1.6] text-[--color-text-secondary]` |
| **Section header** | `.section-header` : mb space-12 | `mb-12` |
| **Card** | `.card` : bg-card, border border-default, radius-2xl, padding space-8, transition 0.3s | inline styles bg/border + `p-8 rounded-[var(--radius-2xl)]` + `transition: all 0.3s ease` |
| **Input** | `.input` : bg-secondary, border-default, radius-md, 0.875rem, transition 0.2s | `bg-[--color-bg-secondary] border-[--color-border-default] rounded-[var(--radius-md)] duration-200` |
| **Input focus** | `.input:focus` : border brand-primary + `0 0 0 3px rgba(247,81,5,0.1)` | `focus:border-[--color-brand-primary] focus:shadow-[0_0_0_3px_rgba(247,81,5,0.1)]` |
| **Btn primary** | `.btn` + `.btn-primary` : inline-flex, gap space-2, py space-3, px space-6, 0.875rem, 600, radius-md, border none, transition 0.2s, bg brand-primary, white | `inline-flex gap-2 py-3 px-6 text-[0.875rem] font-semibold rounded-[var(--radius-md)] border-0 duration-200` |
| **Btn primary hover** | `.btn-primary:hover` : bg brand-secondary, shadow-glow, translateY(-1px) | `hover:bg-[--color-brand-secondary] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(247,81,5,0.3)] hover:-translate-y-[1px]` |
| **Btn secondary** | `.btn-secondary` : transparent, text-primary, border border-default / hover: bg-card, border-strong | toggle inactif : `bg-transparent border-[--color-border-default]` / `hover:bg-[--color-bg-card-hover] hover:border-[--color-border-strong]` |
| **Labels** | `.caption` + label conventions : 0.75rem, semibold, uppercase, tracking, text-muted | `text-[0.75rem] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-[--color-text-muted]` |
